Mar 2 2017 CONTENTS: Blender Blender on Instructional Systems Blender ------- Blender (https://www.blender.org/) is an open source 3D creation suite. It supports the entirety of the 3D pipel

suite. It supports the entirety of the 3D pipeline - modeling, rigging, animation, simulation, rendering, compositing and motion tracking, even video editing and game creation. Blender on Instructional Systems ------------------------------

structional Systems -------------------------------- Blender is installed on the Instructional Linux workstations in 277 Soda and 349 Soda. For hostnames, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs Instructional Sup
.edu/connecting.html#labs Instructional Support Group 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
